name: coTfsLssWaitForActivateBitTimingRequest
title: coTfsLssWaitForActivateBitTimingRequest
description: This function waits for LSS Activate Bit-Timings Parameters request.

parameters.name: pSwitchDelay
parameters.description: Duration (in ms) of the two periods of time to wait until the bit timing parameters switch is done (first period) and before transmitting any CAN message with the new bit timing parameters after performing the switch (second period).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
